queries.query: Please keep a durable log of every MCP, tool, and instruction friction we hit during this debugging run.
Capture agent frictions in the system temp directory so another agent can repair them later.
I want a structured markdown report of every ambiguity, server mismatch, and workflow breakdown you encounter.
Document what the skill told you to do, what you tried, and why it broke.
Set up a temp-directory friction log for this multi-agent run.
Don't just fix issues as you go — record the diagnostic frictions in a durable log.
Fix this Python traceback in my app.
Refactor this function and add comments.
Review this pull request for security problems.
Investigate the build and fix whatever is broken.
